# Brand Guidelines

*Generated by the brand-generator skill.*

## Logo

*Fill in based on what was generated:*

**If a logo was created:**
| Variant | Component | Usage |
|---------|-----------|-------|
| Full | `<LogoFull />` | Header, business cards, email signature |
| Icon | `<LogoIcon />` | Favicon, app icon, mobile nav |
| Wordmark | `<LogoWordmark />` | When mark context is established |
| Monochrome | `<LogoMono />` | Single-colour contexts |

**If no logo exists:**
The site uses typography-only branding with the display font in the header.

## Color Palette

| Token | Light hex | Dark hex | Usage |
|-------|-----------|----------|-------|
| Primary | — | — | Buttons, links, active states |
| Primary foreground | — | — | Text on primary backgrounds |
| Secondary | — | — | Subtle buttons, tags, badges |
| Accent | — | — | Highlights, hover states, decorative elements |
| Background | — | — | Page background |
| Foreground | — | — | Default text colour |
| Muted | — | — | Subdued backgrounds, cards |
| Muted foreground | — | — | Secondary text, captions |
| Border | — | — | Dividers, outlines |
| Ring | — | — | Focus rings |
